content_body: We are that family..."his, hers, ours, theirs - but always all ours"! The moments we all have together are few and far between. So when I planned a quick trip to the mountains to regroup after the holiday, I never imagined it would be so wonderful! My camera is full of our memories. Those images will be with me forever. Thank you, little cabin in the woods! This was exactly what I needed to start this New Year. . .
title: Memory-Filled Family Getaway in Blue Ridge, GA
